Class MenuItem

java.lang.Object
MenuItem
public class MenuItem extends Object
Representation of one row of the Menu table in the database. Contains the following:
  • Unique item id
  • Item name
  • Item price
  • Item type
  • Item Status

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MenuItem()
     
    MenuItem(String itemName, double itemPrice, String itemType, String status)
    Initializes the row given all parameters except id, primarily used for insertions

  • Method Details

    • getItemId

      public int getItemId()
      Retrieves the row's item_id value
      Returns:
      item_id value as integer

    • setItemId

      public void setItemId(int itemId)
      Changes local value of item_id
      Parameters:
      itemId - new local value

    • getItemName

      public String getItemName()
      Retrieves item_name value of row
      Returns:
      local item_value in object

    • setItemName

      public void setItemName(String itemName)
      Changes local value of the item_name in the object row
      Parameters:
      itemName - New value of item_name after change

    • getItemPrice

      public double getItemPrice()
      Retrieves local item_price value
      Returns:
      item_price column value as double

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets status directly using string
      Parameters:
      status -

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Gets status directly as a string
      Returns:
      Should be 'Active' or 'Inactive'

    • setItemPrice

      public void setItemPrice(double itemPrice)
      Changes local item_price column value
      Parameters:
      itemPrice - item_price column value after change

    • getItemType

      public String getItemType()
      Retrieves locally stored item_type column value of the row object
      Returns:
      item_type value in string object

    • setItemType

      public void setItemType(String itemType)
      Changes the locally stored value of the item_type column value of the row object
      Parameters:
      itemType - new local item_type value after change

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Receives status in the form of a boolean
      Returns:
      True if status is 'Active'
